name: Heavenly Lemon Pie with Meringue Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
2. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating until stiff but not dry.
3. Blend in 1 teaspoon lemon juice.
4. Grease a 9-inch pie pan generously.
5. Spoon meringue mixture into the pan and use a tablespoon to push the mixture up around the edges to form the pie shell.
6. Bake at 200°F for 2 hours.
7. Cool.
8. To make the filling, beat egg yolks with 1/2 cup sugar, lemon peel, and juice until light.
9. Cook in a double boiler over boiling water, stirring, until thickened.
10. Remove from heat and let cool thoroughly.
11. Fold in half of the whipped cream.
12. Turn into the meringue crust and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to set.
13. Fold powdered sugar into the remaining whipped cream and spread over the chilled pie.
